title: antrophyum coriaceum
intro: Antrophyum coriaceum, also known as the leather fern, is a species of fern native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Antrophyum coriaceum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments.
